items.title: Greenwood County Holds Public Hearing on Data Center Regulations
items.dek: South Carolina officials heard public input on proposed rules for future data center development amid rising concerns over energy use and local impacts. The session reflects broader national debates on siting and oversight.

items.title: Delta County Planning Commission Backs 12-Month Data Center Moratorium
items.dek: The panel approved a pause on new data center and cryptocurrency mining projects to allow time for zoning ordinance development; the measure remains in effect for a year or until rules are adopted.

items.title: Lawmakers in 20+ States Propose Rules on Data Centers Amid Local Pushback
items.dek: Officials seek guardrails on water and energy use; Rep. Dylan Wegela (D-MI) cites bipartisan concerns while Michigan governor continues to support development
